_comment: Alchemist-surfaced suggestions catalog — cross-backend tool combos and pre-written /cast prompts, grouped by all six focus profiles from focus-profiles.json. A combo's `chain` lists namespaced `serverId/toolName` tools in execution order; the alchemist's value is in combos spanning >1 backend. `verified:true` means EVERY tool in the chain was confirmed on a connected server at the time that specific combo was written/verified; connectivity changes since then are noted in per-combo notes. `verified:false` means the chain references at least one config-present-but-not-connected server. Prompts are pre-written natural-language intents a user can fire via ch1tty/cast; `resolves_to` names the combo (or a single tool) the cast should land on. This is a data artifact only — no loader, no public tool beyond the existing 5. Updated 2026-05-30 to add code, communication, and ops focus profiles (PRs #71, #72, #80). Updated 2026-06-03 to add Linear MCP (linear) to code and governance profiles. Updated 2026-06-04: re-enumerated connected server set. Updated 2026-06-05: notion reconnected; fixed tool names; 13 combos newly verified (31/65 total). Updated 2026-06-05 fifth-pass: +11 combos (76 total); Notion combos verified:false (401). Updated 2026-06-05 seventh-pass: +4 combos (84 total, 30 verified). Updated 2026-06-05 eighth-pass: +2 ops cloudflare-builds combos (86 total, 30 verified). Updated 2026-06-05 ninth-pass: +8 combos covering cloudflare-builds chains, linear workflows, a11y audit, and codebase+evidence governance (94 total, 30 verified). Updated 2026-06-05 eleventh-pass: +3 combos, +5 verifications (99 total, 38 verified) using evidence, browser-rendering, orchestrator backends. Updated 2026-06-05 twelfth-pass: +4 verified combos (103 total, 42 verified) — evidence+orchestrator and playwright+evidence NEW pairings. Updated 2026-06-05 thirteenth-pass: +6 verified combos (109 total, 48 verified) — skill-landscape, specialist-fork, skill-category-deep-dive (ops) + repo-size-profile, library-to-skill-integration-guide, size-aware-architecture (code); first use of orchestrator/provision_fork + fs/list_directory_with_sizes in combos. Updated 2026-06-05 fourteenth-pass: +6 verified combos (115 total, 54 verified) — code-file-quality-analysis, library-search-to-reasoning (code); page-screenshot-design-analysis, interactive-design-flow-analysis (design); web-comm-html-brief (communication); financial-page-screenshot-analysis (finance); first use of browser-rendering/get_url_screenshot in design and finance, first use of playwright/browser_click in catalog.

generatedFrom.connectedServerNote: 2026-06-05 fourteenth-pass: +6 verified combos (115 total, 54 verified). Added code-file-quality-analysis (fs/search_files + fs/read_text_file + thinking + fs/write_file), library-search-to-reasoning (fs/search_files + context7/resolve-library-id + context7/query-docs + thinking); page-screenshot-design-analysis (browser-rendering/get_url_screenshot + thinking + fs/write_file — first get_url_screenshot in design), interactive-design-flow-analysis (playwright/browser_navigate + playwright/browser_click + playwright/browser_take_screenshot + thinking — FIRST browser_click in catalog); web-comm-html-brief (browser-rendering/get_url_html_content + thinking + fs/write_file — first get_url_html_content in communication); financial-page-screenshot-analysis (browser-rendering/get_url_screenshot + thinking + fs/write_file). Confirmed live this session: fs/search_files (0.42), fs/read_text_file (0.36), fs/move_file (0.42), browser-rendering/get_url_screenshot (0.33), browser-rendering/get_url_html_content (0.20), playwright/browser_click (0.30), thinking/sequentialthinking, context7/resolve-library-id (0.50). Notion still 401 (39 combos blocked). Remaining unverified: auth-gated backends (stripe/linear/cloudflare/github/neon/cloudflare-builds ~17 combos) + disabled apps (tasks/ledger/session/chittyevidence ~8 combos).

finance.description: Billing, payments, and financial ecosystem tools — now extended with the append-only ChittyLedger (ledger-mcp) and ChittyAgent Tasks (tasks-mcp) for immutable audit trails and billing workflow tracking. NOTE: stripe, tasks, and ledger backends were NOT connected on the live gateway at generation time — combos involving them are verified:false. Stripe tool names follow the @stripe/mcp surface and are plausible but unverified.

combos.name: invoice-to-ledger-tracker
combos.accomplishes: Pull recent Stripe invoices and write each into a Notion finance tracker database as a page — turning billing state into a queryable, human-readable ledger view.
combos.notes: stripe not connected (lazy); stripe/list_invoices inferred from @stripe/mcp surface. notion/API-post-page is verified.

combos.name: new-customer-onboarding-record
combos.accomplishes: Create a Stripe customer, log the customer record into Notion, and open a GitHub issue to track onboarding follow-up work — a three-backend chain spanning payments, docs, and engineering.
combos.notes: stripe inferred (not connected). notion/API-post-page verified. github not connected (2026-06-04).

combos.name: payment-failure-triage
combos.accomplishes: Enumerate failed/pending Stripe payment intents, reason over likely causes and remediation order with sequential-thinking, then record the triage plan as a Notion page.
combos.notes: stripe inferred. thinking/sequentialthinking and notion/API-post-page verified.

combos.name: invoice-to-immutable-ledger
combos.accomplishes: Pull recent Stripe invoices and append each as an immutable entry to the ChittyLedger — creating an auditable, append-only financial record that cannot be altered after the fact.
combos.notes: stripe inferred (not connected). ledger/append_entry from apps/ledger-mcp — in config (enabled:false). This is the core finance-immutability combo: Stripe is the source of truth for billing; the ledger is the durable audit anchor.

combos.name: billing-task-and-ledger
combos.accomplishes: Create a billing remediation task in ChittyAgent Tasks and simultaneously append a ledger entry recording the intent — so the task's existence is anchored in the immutable ledger before it can be lost or modified.
combos.notes: tasks/create_task from apps/tasks-mcp (enabled:false). ledger/append_entry from apps/ledger-mcp (enabled:false). Both are new apps/*-mcp surfaces — shortest cross-backend finance combo.

combos.name: ledger-to-finance-brief
combos.accomplishes: Pull recent ChittyLedger entries for a financial namespace, reason over them with sequential-thinking to identify anomalies or trends, and write a finance brief into Notion — turning raw ledger state into an actionable narrative.
combos.notes: ledger/list_entries from apps/ledger-mcp (enabled:false). thinking/sequentialthinking and notion/API-post-page are verified on the live gateway.

combos.name: financial-context-brief
combos.accomplishes: Search RAG evidence for financial and billing context (Chitty pricing docs, payment patterns, ledger policy), reason about implications and action items, create a structured finance brief in Notion — a useful fallback until stripe/ledger/tasks backends connect
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed on live connected servers (evidence, thinking, notion). Verified 2026-06-05 fifth-pass. Works as a research-only finance workflow until Stripe/ledger are connected. Caveat (2026-06-05 fifth-pass env): Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) — tool is registered in connected Notion MCP but write calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: financial-doc-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Read financial documents or data exports from filesystem (CSV/JSON billing reports, ledger snapshots), reason about key metrics, anomalies, and action items, document structured summary in Notion
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed on live connected servers (fs, thinking, notion). Verified 2026-06-05 fifth-pass. Works with locally-synced financial data files. Caveat (2026-06-05 fifth-pass env): Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) — tool is registered in connected Notion MCP but write calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: local-finance-doc-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Read a local financial data file (CSV/JSON billing export, ledger snapshot, invoice list) and reason about key metrics, anomalies, and trends — a pure local workflow that works when financial data is already synced to disk.
combos.notes: Both tools confirmed on live connected servers (fs, thinking). 2026-06-05 seventh-pass. Cast scores: fs/read_text_file (1.0 for read intent), thinking/sequentialthinking (0.50 for analyze/reason intent). No Notion/Stripe/ledger dependency — fully verified in remote container.

combos.name: multi-finance-doc-synthesis
combos.accomplishes: Search a directory for financial exports and reports (matching patterns like '*.csv' or '*invoice*'), batch-read all matches simultaneously, then synthesize cross-period insights and anomalies — useful for comparing monthly billing reports or aggregating audit exports.
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed on live connected servers (fs, thinking). 2026-06-05 seventh-pass. Cast scores: fs/search_files (0.56 for search-files intent), fs/read_multiple_files (0.50 for read-multiple-files intent), thinking/sequentialthinking (0.50 for analyze intent). No auth-gated backends required.

combos.name: financial-page-brief
combos.accomplishes: Fetch a financial report page, dashboard, or investor doc as clean markdown via the browser-rendering service, reason over key data points, anomalies, and trends with sequential-thinking, then write a finance brief to a local file — useful for quickly digesting external financial data without manual extraction.
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed on live connected servers. 2026-06-05 eleventh-pass cast probes: browser-rendering/get_url_markdown (0.6 as alternative), thinking/sequentialthinking (1.18), fs/write_file (0.83). browser-rendering confirmed connected (toolCount: 3). Extends page-to-markdown-archive (ends at fs/write_file) with reasoning step. No auth-gated backends required.

combos.name: financial-page-screenshot-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Capture a screenshot of a financial dashboard or reporting page, analyze the visible financial indicators and chart data with reasoning, write a financial snapshot — captures visual dashboard state vs existing financial-page-brief which fetches as markdown.
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed 2026-06-05: browser-rendering/get_url_screenshot (0.33), thinking/sequentialthinking (0.40), fs/write_file (confirmed). Novel: uses screenshot (visual) vs existing financial-page-brief which uses get_url_markdown.

prompts.text: Pull this month's Stripe invoices and log them into my Notion finance tracker
Onboard a new Stripe customer and open a GitHub issue to track their setup
Triage my failed Stripe payments and write up a remediation plan in Notion
List all open Stripe subscriptions
Pull Stripe invoices and append each to the immutable ledger for audit
Create a billing task and lock in the intent on the ledger before it can be lost
Analyze recent ledger entries for anomalies and write a finance brief in Notion
Search evidence for billing and payment context, reason about implications, and create a finance brief in Notion
Read this financial report from disk, analyse the key metrics, and document a summary in Notion
Read this local billing CSV and identify any anomalies or trends
Find all invoice exports in this directory and synthesize a cross-period financial summary
Screenshot this financial dashboard and analyze the visible metrics

governance.description: ChittyOS ecosystem governance, identity, evidence, and persistent state — extended with ChittyAgent Tasks (tasks-mcp), ChittyLedger (ledger-mcp), Session Coordinator (session-mcp), and ChittyEvidence canonical document store (chittyevidence). github and orchestrator NOT connected. Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in remote container — all Notion-write combos are verified:false. See individual combo verified flags.

combos.name: rag-evidence-to-notion-brief
combos.accomplishes: Discover the available AutoRAG vector stores, run an AI search across the evidence corpus, and persist the synthesized findings as a Notion brief — turning raw evidence retrieval into a governed, citable document.
combos.notes: evidence/list_rags, evidence/ai_search, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected (2026-06-05). notion reconnected this pass Note: Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in last recorded run environment — all notion tool calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: issue-triage-to-governance-tracker
combos.accomplishes: List open GitHub issues across a repo, reason over prioritization and ownership with sequential-thinking, and write the prioritized backlog into a Notion governance/tracking database.
combos.notes: github NOT connected (0 tools, 2026-06-04). thinking and notion verified. Previously verified:true when github was connected.

combos.name: skill-discover-and-execute
combos.accomplishes: Find the right ChittyOS skill for a governance task, execute it through the orchestrator, then annotate the outcome as a comment on the relevant Notion page for an audit trail. Spans orchestrator + notion.
combos.notes: orchestrator/skill_search, orchestrator/skill_execute, and notion/API-create-a-comment all confirmed connected (2026-06-05). notion reconnected this pass Note: Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in last recorded run environment — all notion tool calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: context-provisioning-audit
combos.accomplishes: List TY-VY-RY scored ChittyID candidates for a session, run the autonomous provisioning evaluation, and archive the decision + per-aspect rationale into a Notion governance log.
combos.notes: orchestrator/provision_candidates, orchestrator/provision_evaluate, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected (2026-06-05). notion reconnected this pass Note: Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in last recorded run environment — all notion tool calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: agent-route-and-document
combos.accomplishes: Find which ChittyAgent handles a domain task, route the request through the orchestrator's agent protocol, and append the result to an existing Notion page's body.
combos.notes: orchestrator/agent_search, orchestrator/agent_execute, and notion/API-patch-block-children all confirmed connected (2026-06-05). notion reconnected this pass Note: Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in last recorded run environment — all notion tool calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: evidence-backed-issue
combos.accomplishes: Search the evidence corpus for prior art / supporting context, then open a GitHub issue pre-populated with the cited findings — grounding engineering work in governed evidence.
combos.notes: evidence verified. github NOT connected (0 tools, 2026-06-04). Previously verified:true.

combos.name: task-session-evidence
combos.accomplishes: Capture a governance decision as a ChittyAgent task, append it to the active session as a timestamped event, then ingest the rationale as a canonical document with a chittycanon:// URI — creating a three-layer trail: work item → session log → evidence store.
combos.notes: tasks, session, chittyevidence all in config (enabled:false). The combo models the complete governance lifecycle: intent → session context → canonical evidence.

combos.name: session-audit-to-notion
combos.accomplishes: List all active governance sessions, enumerate the events in each, reason over the event stream to identify patterns or anomalies, and render a session audit trail into Notion for human review.
combos.notes: session/list_sessions and session/list_events from apps/session-coordinator-mcp (enabled:false). thinking and notion are verified live.

combos.name: evidence-to-task-to-ledger
combos.accomplishes: Search the canonical evidence store for a governance topic, create follow-up action tasks from the findings, and append the decision to the immutable ledger — a full discover → act → record governance chain.
combos.notes: chittyevidence, tasks, ledger all in config (enabled:false). High-value three-backend governance combo: evidence informs tasks; ledger anchors the decision.

combos.name: ledger-review-to-brief
combos.accomplishes: Audit the governance ledger namespace for a topic (e.g. a session's decisions), reason over the entry stream for completeness and consistency, and produce a governance brief in Notion.
combos.notes: ledger/list_entries from apps/ledger-mcp (enabled:false). thinking and notion are verified live.

combos.name: linear-sprint-to-governance-brief
combos.accomplishes: List active Linear projects and their completion status, reason over blockers and priorities with sequential-thinking, and write a sprint governance brief into Notion — turning engineering issue-tracker state into a governed, stakeholder-readable record.
combos.notes: linear uses mcp.linear.app/mcp (requires authTokenKey: linear-mcp). thinking/sequentialthinking and notion/API-post-page are verified live.

combos.name: evidence-reasoning-brief
combos.accomplishes: AI-search the evidence corpus for a governance topic, reason over the findings with sequential-thinking to synthesize insights and flag gaps, then write a structured brief into Notion. Shortest all-verified cross-backend governance chain — three different backend domains in one intent.
combos.notes: evidence/ai_search, thinking/sequentialthinking, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected (2026-06-05). notion reconnected this pass Note: Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in last recorded run environment — all notion tool calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: rag-survey-to-file
combos.accomplishes: Enumerate all available AutoRAG vector stores and save the inventory to a local file — a discovery-then-archive pattern for documenting what evidence knowledge bases exist without requiring Notion access.
combos.notes: evidence and fs both connected (2026-06-04). Minimal two-backend verified pattern; useful as a quick governance audit step.

combos.name: skill-dispatch-to-file
combos.accomplishes: Find the right ChittyOS skill for a governance task by keyword/intent, execute it through the orchestrator, and write the result to a local file as a durable audit record. A pure-orchestrator-plus-filesystem chain — no external service dependency.
combos.notes: orchestrator (skill_search, skill_execute) and fs (write_file) — all connected 2026-06-04.

combos.name: provision-evaluate-and-bind
combos.accomplishes: Evaluate which ChittyID context entity should serve a session using TY-VY-RY scoring, then execute the binding decision — the full ChittyID provisioning flow in two sequential orchestrator calls.
combos.notes: Pure orchestrator chain — provision_evaluate and provision_bind both confirmed live 2026-06-04.

combos.name: evidence-search-reason-write
combos.accomplishes: Search the AutoRAG evidence store for relevant documents, reason through the findings with sequential thinking to synthesise an analysis or audit summary, then write the final report to a file — a three-backend research-to-document chain.
combos.notes: evidence/search, thinking/sequentialthinking, and fs/write_file all confirmed on connected servers (2026-06-04 third pass).

combos.name: provision-candidates-report
combos.accomplishes: Enumerate provisioning candidates from the orchestrator, run the evaluation step to score each candidate, then write the ranked evaluation report to a file — a two-backend governance audit chain.
combos.notes: orchestrator/provision_candidates and orchestrator/provision_evaluate confirmed via live status (13 orchestrator tools connected, 2026-06-04 third pass). fs/write_file confirmed connected.

combos.name: web-capture-evidence-to-brief
combos.accomplishes: Navigate to a web resource, capture screenshot proof, search RAG evidence for related context, then create a Notion brief combining screenshot and evidence findings
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed on live connected servers (playwright, evidence, notion). 2026-06-05 fifth-pass verification. Caveat (2026-06-05 fifth-pass env): Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) — tool is registered in connected Notion MCP but write calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: codebase-context-reasoning
combos.accomplishes: Survey a project directory, read key source files, reason through architecture and governance implications, document structured findings in Notion
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed on live connected servers (fs, thinking, notion). Uses read_text_file (not deprecated read_file). 2026-06-05 fifth-pass verification. Caveat (2026-06-05 fifth-pass env): Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) — tool is registered in connected Notion MCP but write calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: linear-sprint-governance-report
combos.accomplishes: List active Linear projects and their open issues, reason over governance-relevant patterns — overdue items, issues without owners, milestone coverage gaps, policy category distribution — then write a governance-quality sprint health report to a local file.
combos.notes: linear not connected (auth-gated). thinking and fs accessible. Fills the governance profile's gap for sprint-level process health tracking via Linear; complements linear-sprint-to-governance-brief (which writes to Notion) with a file-based output path.

combos.name: codebase-evidence-governance-audit
combos.accomplishes: Survey the local codebase structure, read key config and architecture files, search the evidence corpus for relevant governance policies or prior audits, reason over compliance gaps between what the code does and what policy requires, then write a governance audit report — binding local codebase state to the external evidence/policy corpus.
combos.notes: All 5 tools confirmed on live connected servers. 2026-06-05 eleventh-pass cast probes: fs/list_directory, fs/read_text_file (fs server: toolCount 14), evidence/ai_search (1.3), thinking/sequentialthinking (1.18), fs/write_file (0.83). evidence backend confirmed connected (toolCount: 3). 5-tool cross-domain chain: codebase survey then evidence context then reasoning then output. No auth-gated backends required.

combos.name: rag-aware-governance-report
combos.accomplishes: List all available AutoRAG vector stores to discover relevant knowledge bases, run an AI-powered semantic search across the most relevant one, reason over the findings with sequential thinking to surface governance insights, then write a structured evidence-backed report to a local file.
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed on live connected servers. 2026-06-05 eleventh-pass cast probes: evidence/list_rags (1.05), evidence/ai_search (1.3), thinking/sequentialthinking (1.18), fs/write_file (0.83). Extends rag-survey-to-file (list_rags then write) with deep search and reasoning. No auth-gated backends required.

combos.name: capability-landscape-report
combos.accomplishes: Search the ChittyOS agent registry by capability or domain to discover which agents are available, then search the skill registry for related skills and triggers, reason over the combined capability landscape with sequential thinking to identify coverage gaps or redundancies, then write a structured capability audit to a local file.
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed on live connected servers. 2026-06-05 eleventh-pass cast probes: orchestrator/agent_search (0.75), orchestrator/skill_search (0.75), thinking/sequentialthinking (1.18), fs/write_file (0.83). orchestrator backend confirmed connected (toolCount: 13). Cross-backend: orchestrator plus thinking plus fs. No auth-gated backends required.

combos.name: evidence-skill-discovery
combos.accomplishes: AI-search the evidence corpus for a domain topic (governance area, project concern, capability gap), then search the ChittyOS skill registry for skills that match or serve that domain, reason over the alignment between what the evidence describes and what skills are available, and write a capability-gap or coverage report — binding the organization's documented knowledge to its operational skill inventory.
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed on live connected servers. 2026-06-05 twelfth-pass cast probes: evidence/ai_search (0.8), orchestrator/skill_search (1.13 for list-skills intent), thinking/sequentialthinking (1.18), fs/write_file (0.83). NEW pairing: evidence + orchestrator not previously combined in catalog. Cross-domain: evidence corpus + ChittyOS skill registry + reasoning + file output. No auth-gated backends required.

combos.name: playwright-evidence-overlay
combos.accomplishes: Navigate to a web-based governance tool, dashboard, or external resource with Playwright, capture a structured accessibility snapshot of its DOM state (ARIA roles, form values, interactive elements), then AI-search the evidence corpus for relevant governance policies, requirements, or prior context related to what the page shows — writing a combined overlay report that merges DOM state with evidence-backed context.
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed on live connected servers. 2026-06-05 twelfth-pass cast probes: playwright/browser_navigate (1.05), playwright/browser_snapshot (0.78), evidence/ai_search (0.8), fs/write_file (0.83). NEW pairing: playwright + evidence not previously combined in catalog. Cross-domain: browser automation + evidence corpus + file output. No auth-gated backends required.

design.description: Browser rendering, automation, and desktop/visual work — extended with ChittyEvidence (chittyevidence) for canonical archival of visual artifacts, and ChittyAgent Tasks (tasks-mcp) for turning design findings into tracked work items. github NOT connected. Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in remote container — Notion-write combos are verified:false. See individual combo verified flags.

combos.name: capture-archive-document
combos.accomplishes: Screenshot a live URL via Cloudflare browser-rendering, save the image to the local filesystem, then embed/reference it in a Notion page — a capture→archive→document pipeline across three backends.
combos.notes: browser-rendering/get_url_screenshot, fs/write_file, and notion/API-patch-block-children all confirmed connected (2026-06-05) Note: Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in last recorded run environment — all notion tool calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: visual-bug-report
combos.accomplishes: Drive a real browser to the failing page, capture an accessibility snapshot (better than a screenshot for actionable detail), and file a GitHub issue with the reproduction — a QA-to-engineering handoff spanning playwright + github.
combos.notes: playwright verified. github NOT connected (0 tools, 2026-06-04). Previously verified:true.

combos.name: page-to-markdown-archive
combos.accomplishes: Convert any web page to clean Markdown via browser-rendering and save it locally — a lightweight content-capture combo for design references and competitive teardowns.
combos.notes: browser-rendering and fs connected. Verified 2026-06-04.

combos.name: form-fill-and-screenshot-proof
combos.accomplishes: Automate a form submission flow end-to-end and capture a screenshot proof saved to disk — verifying a UI flow works and producing visual evidence. (playwright-heavy, but fs makes the artifact durable cross-backend.)
combos.notes: playwright and fs connected. Verified 2026-06-04.

combos.name: live-page-html-to-docs
combos.accomplishes: Fetch a live page's raw HTML, cross-reference the framework/library it uses against current docs via context7, and write an implementation note into Notion — useful for reverse-engineering a design pattern.
combos.notes: Fixed context7/get-library-docs → context7/query-docs (2026-06-05). browser-rendering/get_url_html_content, context7/query-docs, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected Note: Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in last recorded run environment — all notion tool calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: screenshot-to-canonical-evidence
combos.accomplishes: Screenshot a live URL and ingest the resulting image as a canonical evidence document with a chittycanon:// URI — making visual design artifacts governed, citable, and retrievable by future evidence searches rather than lost in a local folder.
combos.notes: browser-rendering is verified live. chittyevidence/ingest_document from apps/evidence-mcp (enabled:false pending CHITTY_EVIDENCE_TOKEN).

combos.name: browser-test-to-task
combos.accomplishes: Drive a live browser to a design target, capture an accessibility snapshot revealing the actual DOM state, and immediately create a tracked ChittyAgent task for any issues found.
combos.notes: playwright is verified live. tasks/create_task from apps/tasks-mcp (enabled:false). Shortest cross-backend design-to-work-tracking combo.

combos.name: playwright-capture-to-notion
combos.accomplishes: Navigate to a design target URL, capture a full-page screenshot, and post it as a new Notion page for team review — a three-step visual documentation pipeline driven from a single cast intent.
combos.notes: playwright/browser_navigate, playwright/browser_take_screenshot, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected (2026-06-05) Note: Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in last recorded run environment — all notion tool calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: page-markdown-to-notion-brief
combos.accomplishes: Convert a live URL to clean Markdown via browser-rendering, reason over the content with sequential-thinking to extract key design patterns or decisions, then write the synthesized brief into Notion — deeper than a raw archive, more governed than a manual note.
combos.notes: browser-rendering/get_url_markdown, thinking/sequentialthinking, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected (2026-06-05) Note: Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in last recorded run environment — all notion tool calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: screenshot-to-file
combos.accomplishes: Capture a full-page screenshot of any URL via the headless browser-rendering service, then write the image data to a local file — a minimal two-backend visual archiving chain.
combos.notes: browser-rendering/get_url_screenshot confirmed from live cast probe (2026-06-04). fs/write_file confirmed connected.

combos.name: navigate-screenshot-save
combos.accomplishes: Navigate to a URL with a full Playwright browser instance (supports auth flows, JS-heavy pages), take a screenshot at the current rendered state, then persist the screenshot to disk — playwright + fs two-backend chain.
combos.notes: playwright/browser_navigate and playwright/browser_take_screenshot confirmed via live cast probes (2026-06-04). fs/write_file confirmed connected.

combos.name: a11y-snapshot-to-notion-audit
combos.accomplishes: Navigate to a page, capture the accessibility tree snapshot (richer than screenshot for structural analysis), reason about UX/a11y issues and improvements, document the audit in Notion
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed. browser_snapshot is preferred over screenshot for accessibility analysis (returns structured DOM tree). 2026-06-05 fifth-pass verification. Caveat (2026-06-05 fifth-pass env): Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) — tool is registered in connected Notion MCP but write calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: page-html-analysis-to-file
combos.accomplishes: Fetch full HTML content of a web page, reason through DOM structure, patterns, and potential issues, save a structured analysis report to file
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed on live connected servers (browser-rendering, thinking, fs). 2026-06-05 fifth-pass verification.

combos.name: a11y-audit-to-file
combos.accomplishes: Navigate to a target page with Playwright, capture its full accessibility snapshot (ARIA roles, labels, interactive elements), reason over WCAG 2.1 compliance gaps and severity levels with sequential-thinking, then write a structured a11y audit report to a local file.
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed on live connected servers. 2026-06-05 tenth-pass cast probes: playwright/browser_navigate (1.05), playwright/browser_snapshot (0.78 — resolves directly), thinking/sequentialthinking (1.18), fs/write_file (0.83 as alternative for write intent). Extends a11y-snapshot-to-notion-audit (same first two steps) with reasoning + file output instead of Notion. playwright available via npx (lazy spawn, no auth required).

combos.name: page-screenshot-design-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Get a page screenshot via browser-rendering's screenshot tool, analyze visual design elements and hierarchy with reasoning, write a design assessment report — complements existing page-html-analysis-to-file by using the visual/screenshot surface rather than HTML markup.
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed 2026-06-05: browser-rendering/get_url_screenshot (0.33), thinking/sequentialthinking (0.44), fs/write_file (0.30). Novel: first use of browser-rendering/get_url_screenshot in design profile.

combos.name: interactive-design-flow-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Navigate to a page, click an interactive element, capture the resulting state as a screenshot, then reason about the interaction design quality — the first catalog chain to include playwright/browser_click, enabling interactive UX testing.
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed 2026-06-05: playwright/browser_navigate (1.05), playwright/browser_click (0.30), playwright/browser_take_screenshot (0.29), thinking/sequentialthinking (confirmed). Novel: first browser_click usage in catalog.

code.description: Software development — source control, deployment, library documentation, database, and code quality tools. github NOT connected — library-docs-to-github-issue is verified:false. neon NOT connected — schema/db combos are verified:false. Notion API returning 401 in remote container — Notion-write combos are verified:false. See individual combo verified flags.

combos.name: library-research-to-docs
combos.accomplishes: Resolve a library name to its canonical context7 ID, fetch the current API documentation, and write a usage note into Notion — turning live library docs into a durable, searchable implementation reference.
combos.notes: Fixed context7/get-library-docs → context7/query-docs (2026-06-05). context7/resolve-library-id, context7/query-docs, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected Note: Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in last recorded run environment — all notion tool calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: schema-branch-and-migrate
combos.accomplishes: Create a Neon database branch for a schema change, apply the migration SQL, then describe the resulting table schema to confirm the change landed — a safe non-destructive schema migration workflow on a throwaway branch.
combos.notes: neon NOT connected (0 tools, 2026-06-04). Previously verified:true. Re-enable when NEON_API_KEY is available.

combos.name: schema-to-notion-doc
combos.accomplishes: Pull the current schema for a Neon table and write it as a Notion documentation page — keeping your data-model docs in sync with the live database without manual copy-paste.
combos.notes: neon NOT connected (0 tools, 2026-06-04). notion verified. Previously verified:true.

combos.name: library-docs-to-github-issue
combos.accomplishes: Look up the latest docs for a library dependency, then open a GitHub issue pre-populated with the relevant API details — grounding an implementation task in current, accurate documentation rather than stale memory.
combos.notes: context7 verified. github NOT connected (0 tools, 2026-06-04). Previously verified:true.

combos.name: code-search-and-file-context
combos.accomplishes: Use Serena's code-intelligence search to locate a symbol or pattern across the workspace, then read the full file context around the match — a semantic-then-deep drill-down that avoids scanning files blindly.
combos.notes: serena not connected (lazy, requires token). fs/read_text_file verified live.

combos.name: db-branch-test-and-document
combos.accomplishes: Branch the database, run a test query or migration against the branch, then write the outcome into a Notion page — a lightweight experiment-then-document pattern for database changes.
combos.notes: neon NOT connected (0 tools, 2026-06-04). notion verified. Previously verified:true.

combos.name: workers-deploy-and-verify
combos.accomplishes: Upload a new Cloudflare Worker script and immediately fetch it back to verify the deployment landed correctly — a tight deploy→verify loop before any downstream tests run.
combos.notes: cloudflare not connected (remote endpoint, requires token). Tool names inferred from cloudflare MCP surface.

combos.name: linear-issue-to-github-pr
combos.accomplishes: List Linear issues assigned to the current sprint, then open a GitHub pull request for each — keeping issue tracking and code review in sync without manual cross-tool copy-paste.
combos.notes: linear requires authTokenKey: linear-mcp. github NOT connected (2026-06-04).

combos.name: linear-bug-to-library-context
combos.accomplishes: Fetch a Linear bug report, resolve the affected library via Context7, and load the library's API docs — giving a developer immediate reference context to reproduce and fix the issue without leaving the terminal.
combos.notes: linear inferred (auth required); context7/resolve-library-id and context7/query-docs verified.

combos.name: context7-docs-to-file
combos.accomplishes: Resolve a library name, fetch its current API documentation, and write the result to a local file for offline reference or inclusion in a project's docs folder — a verified three-backend chain spanning docs-resolution + filesystem persistence.
combos.notes: context7 and fs both connected (2026-06-04). New combo this run. Cast: 'research library docs and save to local file' resolves to context7/resolve-library-id (score 0.31) with fs alternatives confirmed in resolution path. Fixed context7/get-library-docs → context7/query-docs (2026-06-05).

combos.name: fs-survey-and-document
combos.accomplishes: List the top-level project directory contents, reason over the structure with sequential-thinking to identify architectural patterns or concerns, and write a technical architecture note into Notion — a codebase-to-doc pipeline using locally-available backends. Note: fs/list_directory covers one path at a time; enumerate subdirectories separately for deeper coverage.
combos.notes: Fixed fs/directory_tree → fs/list_directory (2026-06-05); list_directory is single-level (not recursive). fs/list_directory, thinking/sequentialthinking, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected Note: Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in last recorded run environment — all notion tool calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: evidence-library-cross-ref
combos.accomplishes: Search the evidence corpus for prior art on a library or technology decision, then pull the current API documentation for the same library — correlating historical ChittyOS usage patterns with live upstream docs to ground implementation choices.
combos.notes: evidence and context7 both connected (2026-06-04). New combo this run — spans two different backends not previously combined in catalog. No prior evidence+context7 chain existed. Fixed context7/get-library-docs → context7/query-docs (2026-06-05).

combos.name: docs-to-thinking
combos.accomplishes: Resolve a library name to its Context7 ID, retrieve authoritative docs and code examples, then pass the documentation through sequential thinking to plan an integration, pick the right API, or reason through a technical decision — context7 + thinking two-backend chain.
combos.notes: context7/resolve-library-id and context7/query-docs confirmed via live cast probes. thinking/sequentialthinking confirmed at score 0.8 in reasoning cast (2026-06-04 third pass). Fixed context7/get-library-docs → context7/query-docs (2026-06-05).

combos.name: codebase-architecture-report
combos.accomplishes: Survey a codebase directory structure, read key source files, reason about architectural patterns and technical debt, write a structured architecture report to file
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed on live connected servers (fs, thinking). Uses read_text_file not deprecated read_file. 2026-06-05 fifth-pass verification.

combos.name: evidence-library-research
combos.accomplishes: Search RAG evidence for project-specific context, resolve and fetch authoritative library documentation for the relevant tool/framework, save combined research findings to file
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed on live connected servers (evidence, context7, fs). Extends existing evidence-library-cross-ref with a file output step. 2026-06-05 fifth-pass verification.

combos.name: search-to-library-docs
combos.accomplishes: Search the codebase for files matching a pattern to identify which library is in use, then resolve its canonical context7 ID and fetch current API documentation — connecting a code scan directly to authoritative library reference.
combos.notes: All 3 steps confirmed via live cast probes (2026-06-05): fs/search_files (score 0.67), context7/resolve-library-id (0.67), context7/query-docs (0.75). No Notion dependency — verified independently of Notion API status.

combos.name: tree-to-architecture-thinking
combos.accomplishes: Get a full recursive JSON tree view of the project, then use sequential thinking to reason through the architecture — identifying module boundaries, dependency patterns, and structural concerns.
combos.notes: Both steps confirmed via live cast probes (2026-06-05): fs/directory_tree (score 0.50), thinking/sequentialthinking (score 0.55). No Notion dependency — verified independently of Notion API status.

combos.name: build-log-lib-docs-research
combos.accomplishes: Pull build logs for a failing Workers build, identify the broken dependency by name, resolve its library ID via context7, fetch the current docs, reason over the fix approach, then write a remediation plan — connecting the CI failure signal directly to authoritative library docs.
combos.notes: cloudflare-builds not connected (auth-gated). context7 available (npx, no auth) but lazy. Highest-value cloudflare-builds+code combo: routes a build failure directly into library documentation research.

combos.name: linear-issue-codebase-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Fetch a Linear issue's full description and metadata, search the local codebase for relevant files matching the issue keywords, read the most relevant ones, reason over the implementation approach or root cause, then write a structured analysis — grounding issue-driven work in actual code context.
combos.notes: linear not connected (auth-gated). fs and thinking available locally. Tightest linear+codebase combo: issue context pulls code context pulls reasoning.

combos.name: library-docs-to-file
combos.accomplishes: Resolve a library or framework name to its context7 library ID, query current documentation and code examples, reason over the relevant API surface and design patterns with sequential thinking, then write a structured technical summary to a local file — turning on-demand library research into a persistent, queryable reference.
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed on live connected servers. 2026-06-05 tenth-pass cast probes: context7/resolve-library-id (1.10), context7/query-docs (0.90 as alternative), thinking/sequentialthinking (1.18), fs/write_file (0.83 as alternative). Extends search-to-library-docs (ends at query-docs) with reasoning + file output. context7 available via npx (lazy spawn, no auth required). No auth-gated backends required.

combos.name: web-evidence-cross-reference
combos.accomplishes: Fetch the full HTML content of a web page via Cloudflare browser rendering, run an AI-powered semantic search against the evidence base to find related documents and prior research, reason over the combined web context and evidence with sequential thinking to surface insights or gaps, then write a structured cross-reference report to a local file.
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed on live connected servers. 2026-06-05 eleventh-pass cast probes: browser-rendering/get_url_html_content (0.6), evidence/ai_search (1.3), thinking/sequentialthinking (1.18), fs/write_file (0.83). Cross-domain: browser-rendering plus evidence plus thinking plus fs, 4 distinct backends. No auth-gated backends required.

combos.name: repo-size-profile-report
combos.accomplishes: Survey a repository directory listing with sizes, reason about large artifacts, bloated directories, and cleanup opportunities, write a storage profile and priority cleanup report — uses the size-aware directory listing for targeted analysis
combos.notes: fs/list_directory_with_sizes confirmed live (returned directory listing with sizes) 2026-06-05; thinking/sequentialthinking and fs/write_file confirmed live this pass

combos.name: library-to-skill-integration-guide
combos.accomplishes: Resolve a library ID, fetch its documentation and code examples, search ecosystem skills that compose with or use that library, write an integration guide linking library usage to ChittyOS capabilities — cross-domain: documents + ecosystem + desktop
combos.notes: context7/resolve-library-id and context7/query-docs confirmed live 2026-06-05; orchestrator/skill_search confirmed live (cast score 0.76); fs/write_file confirmed live; novel 4-backend chain spanning documents+ecosystem+desktop categories

combos.name: size-aware-architecture-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Survey directory sizes to identify heavy modules and storage hot-spots, then get recursive tree structure for full architectural context, reason about bloat, refactor priorities, and dependency weight — size-aware complement to tree-to-architecture-thinking
combos.notes: fs/list_directory_with_sizes and fs/directory_tree both confirmed live via cast (score 0.66) 2026-06-05; thinking confirmed live; distinct from tree-to-architecture-thinking by leading with size data before tree

combos.name: code-file-quality-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Search source files by pattern, read a key file, analyze code quality patterns with sequential reasoning, then write a findings report — a 4-step chain that adds targeted file read and written output to the existing search→think pattern.
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed 2026-06-05: fs/search_files (0.42), fs/read_text_file (0.36), thinking/sequentialthinking, fs/write_file (0.30). Novel: 4-step chain not in catalog; adds file read + output vs existing 2-step search→think.

combos.name: library-search-to-reasoning
combos.accomplishes: Search codebase for library import patterns, resolve the library in context7, fetch current documentation, then reason about upgrade paths or usage best practices — extends the existing search-to-library-docs chain with a reasoning step.
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed 2026-06-05: fs/search_files (0.42), context7/resolve-library-id (0.50), context7/query-docs (confirmed), thinking/sequentialthinking (confirmed). Novel: adds reasoning over existing search-to-library-docs 3-step chain.

communication.description: Cross-channel messaging, notes, team communication, and follow-up task creation. chittymac, imessage, and tasks are local MCP servers not connected (require local daemon or token config). Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in remote container — all Notion combos are verified:false. playwright-based combos (web-comm-state-analysis, web-comm-snapshot-analysis) are verified. See individual combo verified flags.

combos.name: notion-note-to-task
combos.accomplishes: Search the Notion workspace for a note or meeting page, then create a ChittyAgent task from its action items — turning unstructured notes into tracked, prioritized work items without leaving the chat interface.
combos.notes: notion/API-post-search verified live. tasks/create_task from apps/tasks-mcp (enabled:false pending token).

combos.name: imessage-thread-to-brief
combos.accomplishes: Pull recent messages from an iMessage thread, use sequential-thinking to identify key decisions and action items, then write a summary brief into Notion — turning an async chat thread into a durable structured record.
combos.notes: imessage not connected (requires local daemon). thinking and notion verified live.

combos.name: task-to-imessage-notification
combos.accomplishes: List open ChittyAgent tasks for a context and send a status summary as an iMessage — a pull-and-broadcast pattern for keeping stakeholders updated without a separate notification pipeline.
combos.notes: tasks from apps/tasks-mcp (enabled:false). imessage not connected. Both are plausible per their source surfaces.

combos.name: mac-notification-and-log
combos.accomplishes: Send a macOS system notification via ChittyMac and log the event as a timestamped Notion entry — useful for workflow checkpoints where a human must be alerted and the alert itself must be auditable.
combos.notes: chittymac not connected (requires local ChittyMac daemon). notion/API-post-page verified live.

combos.name: meeting-notes-to-tasks
combos.accomplishes: Fetch a Notion meeting-notes page, reason over the content to extract discrete action items, then create a ChittyAgent task for each — automated meeting-to-action-item extraction across docs and task management.
combos.notes: notion/API-retrieve-a-page and thinking/sequentialthinking verified live. tasks/create_task from apps/tasks-mcp (enabled:false).

combos.name: imessage-and-notion-broadcast
combos.accomplishes: Find the relevant Notion page for a project update, send its summary via iMessage to the stakeholders, and fire a macOS notification as a local confirmation — a three-channel broadcast from a single intent.
combos.notes: notion/API-post-search verified. imessage and chittymac not connected.

combos.name: notion-reasoning-summary
combos.accomplishes: Read a Notion meeting-notes or discussion page, reason over the content with sequential-thinking to extract key decisions, commitments, and open questions, then write a clean summary page — automated meeting distillation using only verified-live backends.
combos.notes: notion/API-retrieve-a-page, thinking/sequentialthinking, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected (2026-06-05). notion reconnected this pass Note: Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in last recorded run environment — all notion tool calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: notion-knowledge-synthesis
combos.accomplishes: Search Notion for existing knowledge pages on a topic, retrieve their content, reason about common themes, gaps, and connections, synthesize a new summary page — useful for async team briefs and knowledge consolidation
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed: API-post-search confirmed connected; API-retrieve-a-page in verified notion-reasoning-summary; thinking and API-post-page confirmed. 2026-06-05 fifth-pass verification. Caveat (2026-06-05 fifth-pass env): Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) — tool is registered in connected Notion MCP but write calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: web-capture-to-notion-note
combos.accomplishes: Navigate to a web resource, capture a screenshot for visual reference, create a Notion note with the screenshot — useful for visual handoffs, async team updates, and capturing state of external tools
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed on live connected servers (playwright, notion). 2026-06-05 fifth-pass verification. Caveat (2026-06-05 fifth-pass env): Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) — tool is registered in connected Notion MCP but write calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: web-comm-state-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Navigate to a web-based communication platform (Slack web, Gmail, messaging dashboard), take a screenshot of the current state, and reason about unread counts, message priorities, and action items — useful for auditing communication channels from the local browser.
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed on live connected servers (playwright, thinking). 2026-06-05 seventh-pass. Cast scores: playwright/browser_take_screenshot (0.50 for screenshot intent), playwright/browser_navigate (0.33 for navigate intent), thinking/sequentialthinking (0.33 for analysis intent). No auth-gated backends required.

combos.name: web-comm-snapshot-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Navigate to a web-based messaging tool, capture a structured accessibility snapshot (better than screenshot for element-level data), then reason about message threads, unread items, and required responses — enables structured extraction of communication state from browser-accessible tools.
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed on live connected servers (playwright, thinking). 2026-06-05 seventh-pass. Cast scores: playwright/browser_snapshot (0.33 for accessibility-snapshot intent), playwright/browser_navigate (0.33 for navigate intent), thinking/sequentialthinking (0.33 for analysis intent). Prefer over web-comm-state-analysis when structured element data is needed.

combos.name: web-snapshot-report
combos.accomplishes: Navigate to a web-based communication or collaboration tool, capture a structured accessibility snapshot (ARIA roles, thread counts, message previews), reason over communication state and priority action items, then write a summary report to a local file — persisting the analysis for async review or as a daily digest artifact.
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed on live connected servers. 2026-06-05 tenth-pass cast probes: playwright/browser_navigate (1.05), playwright/browser_snapshot (0.78), thinking/sequentialthinking (1.18), fs/write_file (0.83 as alternative). Extends web-comm-snapshot-analysis (ends at thinking) with file output step. playwright available via npx (lazy spawn, no auth required). No auth-gated backends required.

combos.name: web-comm-html-brief
combos.accomplishes: Fetch a communication platform page's raw HTML, extract communication channel patterns and key feature structures with reasoning, write a structured platform analysis brief — uses HTML content for richer structural analysis vs markdown or screenshot.
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed 2026-06-05: browser-rendering/get_url_html_content (0.20 as alternative), thinking/sequentialthinking (confirmed), fs/write_file (confirmed). Novel: first browser-rendering/get_url_html_content in communication profile.

ops.description: Deployment, infrastructure monitoring, and DevOps tooling — Cloudflare Workers, database ops, source control, filesystem, and orchestration. orchestrator now connected (13 tools: skill_*/agent_*/provision_*, 2026-06-04) — stale run_job/list_jobs tool names replaced with real skill_*/agent_* equivalents. cloudflare, neon, and github not connected — combos referencing them remain verified:false. New verified:true combos added using orchestrator + fs + thinking.

combos.name: deploy-and-document
combos.accomplishes: Deploy a Cloudflare Worker to production and immediately create a Notion deployment log page — so every release is timestamped and searchable in the team's workspace.
combos.notes: cloudflare not connected at generation time. notion/API-post-page verified.

combos.name: worker-logs-to-incident
combos.accomplishes: Pull recent error logs from a deployed Cloudflare Worker, reason over root cause and remediation steps with sequential-thinking, then write a structured incident report into Notion.
combos.notes: cloudflare not connected. thinking/sequentialthinking and notion/API-post-page verified.

combos.name: db-backup-via-orchestrator
combos.accomplishes: Search the ChittyAgent skill registry for a database backup skill, then execute it through the orchestrator — dispatching the backup operation via the registered skill. Note: this combo dispatches the skill but does not perform an independent post-backup verification step.
combos.notes: orchestrator connected (2026-06-04). Replaces stale run_job/neon chain. Renamed from db-backup-and-verify: no independent verify step is included (verification is delegated to the backup skill itself). — real API uses skill_search + skill_execute. Pure orchestrator, no external deps.

combos.name: agent-incident-triage
combos.accomplishes: Enumerate all ChittyAgent agents with their binding status and capabilities, reason over the agent inventory with sequential-thinking to identify gaps or anomalies in agent coverage, and write a structured inventory audit report to a local file — an ops audit of agent registration state, not a real-time health probe.
combos.notes: orchestrator (agent_list), thinking, and fs — all connected 2026-06-04. Replaces stale list_jobs/github chain. NOTE: agent_list returns static inventory (binding/capabilities), not runtime health — describes agent registration state, not live degradation status. — real API uses agent_list.

combos.name: pr-to-deploy-pipeline
combos.accomplishes: List merged pull requests, trigger a Cloudflare Worker deploy for the release, and create a Notion deployment page linking the PR number — a three-backend deploy pipeline from a single cast intent.
combos.notes: github NOT connected (2026-06-04). cloudflare not connected. notion/API-post-page verified.

combos.name: infra-health-snapshot
combos.accomplishes: Pull the full ChittyAgent registry: enumerate all agents (binding status, capabilities, domains) and all available skills (triggers, execution type, descriptions) — then write a combined infrastructure health snapshot to a local file. A complete orchestrator registry dump in two API calls.
combos.notes: orchestrator (agent_list, skill_list) and fs — all connected 2026-06-04. Replaces stale list_jobs/neon/notion chain. Pure orchestrator+fs.

combos.name: page-content-to-runbook
combos.accomplishes: Fetch public deployment documentation or runbook pages as clean Markdown and save them to a local file — a pull-and-archive pattern for keeping ops runbooks current without manual copy-paste from browser to editor.
combos.notes: browser-rendering and fs both connected (2026-06-04). New combo this run. Minimal two-backend ops pattern.

combos.name: codebase-scan-to-notion
combos.accomplishes: Walk the project directory tree, search for files matching an ops-relevant pattern (e.g. Dockerfiles, config files, worker entry points), and write the inventory into a Notion ops page — a codebase-aware ops catalog.
combos.notes: Fixed fs/directory_tree → fs/list_directory (2026-06-05). fs/list_directory, fs/search_files, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected Note: Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in last recorded run environment — all notion tool calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: skill-search-and-run
combos.accomplishes: Discover the most relevant ChittyOS skill for an intent, execute it via the orchestrator, and persist the output to a local file — a complete search-run-record pipeline driven entirely from natural language.
combos.notes: orchestrator (skill_search, skill_execute) and fs (write_file) — all connected 2026-06-04.

combos.name: agent-inventory-to-file
combos.accomplishes: List all agents in the ChittyAgent ecosystem with their binding status, capabilities, and tool counts, then write the inventory to a local file for offline ops review or change-detection tracking.
combos.notes: orchestrator (agent_list) and fs — both connected 2026-06-04. Simplest orchestrator+fs combo.

combos.name: page-to-runbook-via-thinking
combos.accomplishes: Fetch any URL as clean markdown (status page, incident post-mortem, deployment guide), reason through the ops implications with sequential thinking, then write the resulting runbook or action plan to a file — browser-rendering + thinking + fs three-backend chain.
combos.notes: browser-rendering/get_url_markdown confirmed from existing verified combo page-to-markdown-archive. thinking/sequentialthinking and fs/write_file confirmed connected (2026-06-04 third pass).

combos.name: provision-bind-and-document
combos.accomplishes: Discover provision candidates for a session, evaluate and score them, bind the best fit, then document the provisioning decision and rationale in a Notion page
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed: provision_candidates/evaluate/bind from existing verified combos; notion/API-post-page confirmed. 2026-06-05 fifth-pass verification. Caveat (2026-06-05 fifth-pass env): Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) — tool is registered in connected Notion MCP but write calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: config-search-to-ops-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Recursively search for configuration, deployment, or infrastructure files matching a pattern, then use sequential thinking to analyze the operational surface — identifying risks, dependencies, and runbook-relevant patterns.
combos.notes: Both steps confirmed via live cast probes (2026-06-05): fs/search_files (score 0.67), thinking/sequentialthinking (score 0.55). No Notion dependency — verified independently of Notion API status.

combos.name: project-tree-to-ops-reasoning
combos.accomplishes: Inventory the full project directory tree as a recursive JSON structure, then reason through it from an operations lens — surfaces which directories hold sensitive configs, where build artifacts live, and what the deployment surface looks like.
combos.notes: Both steps confirmed via live cast probes (2026-06-05): fs/directory_tree (score 0.50), thinking/sequentialthinking (score 0.55). Same backends as tree-to-architecture-thinking but ops focus context — deployment/risk reasoning vs. architectural design. No Notion dependency.

combos.name: build-status-to-worker-logs
combos.accomplishes: List recent Workers Builds runs to identify the latest build outcome, then retrieve the deployed Worker's runtime logs to correlate build success or failure with live production behavior — closing the CI-to-production feedback loop.
combos.notes: cloudflare-builds not connected (auth via cloudflare-builds-mcp: op://ChittyOS-Integrations/cloudflare-builds-mcp/token). cloudflare not connected in remote container. Both are ops-focus servers. Tool names follow official workers-builds MCP surface: workers_builds_list_builds, workers_builds_get_build, workers_builds_get_build_logs, workers_builds_set_active_worker.

combos.name: build-triage
combos.accomplishes: List recent Workers Builds runs to surface failed build UUIDs, then fetch the full build logs for the failing run — closing the triage loop without leaving the builds MCP surface.
combos.notes: cloudflare-builds not connected in remote container. Auth via cloudflare-builds-mcp token (op://ChittyOS-Integrations/cloudflare-builds-mcp/token). workers_builds_set_active_worker only sets the active workerId for subsequent API calls (session context setter), not a build version activator — it does not belong in rollback chains.

combos.name: build-failure-triage-report
combos.accomplishes: List recent Workers Builds runs, pull the full logs for any failed run, reason over error patterns and root causes with sequential-thinking, then write a triage runbook to a local file — turning opaque CI failures into an actionable remediation plan.
combos.notes: cloudflare-builds not connected in container (auth-gated). thinking and fs are available locally. Natural extension of the build-triage combo (which stays within cloudflare-builds): adds reasoning + file persistence layer.

combos.name: build-config-review
combos.accomplishes: Fetch the Workers Builds configuration for a specific Worker, reason over it with sequential-thinking to surface potential misconfigurations (wrong build command, missing env vars, suboptimal deploy steps), then write a structured review report — turning raw config into an audit-quality recommendation.
combos.notes: cloudflare-builds not connected in container (auth-gated). 3-step: config read + reason + persist to file.

combos.name: full-provision-audit
combos.accomplishes: Run the complete ChittyID provisioning lifecycle — discover candidates for the session, score them with TY-VY-RY evaluation, execute the binding decision — then write the full decision record (candidate list, scores, rationale, binding outcome) to a local file as a durable audit trail.
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed on live connected servers. 2026-06-05 twelfth-pass: orchestrator/provision_candidates, provision_evaluate, provision_bind all confirmed live (orchestrator toolCount: 13, confirmed via skill_list 2026-06-05). fs/write_file confirmed. Extends provision-evaluate-and-bind (which ends at bind with no file output) by adding provision_candidates at the start for a full 3-step orchestrator flow + durable file output. No auth-gated backends required.

combos.name: orchestrator-evidence-landscape
combos.accomplishes: Enumerate all ChittyAgent agents with their capabilities and binding status, then AI-search the evidence corpus for governance policies, architectural decisions, or requirements relevant to the agent landscape — reason over the alignment between registered agent capabilities and what the evidence base says the system should be able to do, writing a gap analysis or coverage audit to a local file.
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed on live connected servers. 2026-06-05 twelfth-pass cast probes: orchestrator/agent_list (0.97 as alternative for list-agents intent), evidence/ai_search (0.8), thinking/sequentialthinking (1.18), fs/write_file (0.83). NEW pairing: orchestrator agent inventory + evidence corpus not previously combined in catalog. Cross-domain: ChittyOS agent registry + evidence search + reasoning + file output. No auth-gated backends required.

combos.name: skill-landscape-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Enumerate all 54 ChittyOS ecosystem skills via orchestrator, reason about which ones apply to a given task category, write a prioritized skill-selection report — spans ecosystem registry + reasoning + filesystem output
combos.notes: orchestrator/skill_list confirmed live (returned 54 skills) 2026-06-05; thinking/sequentialthinking and fs/write_file confirmed live this pass

combos.name: specialist-fork-and-bind
combos.accomplishes: Fork a domain-specialist ChittyID context from a generalist parent entity (inheriting relevant expertise, pruning non-domain strengths), then bind the session to that fork — provisioning a focused agent context in one two-step flow
combos.notes: orchestrator/provision_fork confirmed live via cast (score 0.78) 2026-06-05; orchestrator/provision_bind confirmed live as cast alternative; both part of the same orchestrator backend

combos.name: skill-category-deep-dive
combos.accomplishes: List all ecosystem skills (54 total), search and filter to a specific domain (devops, finance, legal), reason about how they compose for a complex task, write a capability deep-dive — 4-step orchestrator+reasoning chain for strategic skill selection
combos.notes: orchestrator/skill_list and orchestrator/skill_search both confirmed live 2026-06-05; thinking and fs confirmed live; extends infra-health-snapshot with reasoning layer

prompts.text: Deploy the latest worker build to Cloudflare production and log the release in Notion
Check worker error logs and write up an incident report in Notion
Search for and execute the database backup skill via the ChittyAgent Orchestrator
List all ChittyAgent agents, triage their status, and write an incident analysis to a local file
List merged PRs, deploy the release to Cloudflare, and document it in Notion
Enumerate all ChittyAgent agents and available skills and write the orchestrator registry snapshot to a local file
List all deployed Cloudflare Workers and their last deploy date
List all available orchestrator skills and their triggers and execution types
Fetch the deployment runbook from the docs site and save it locally
Scan the codebase for worker entry points and Dockerfiles, then write an ops inventory to Notion
Search for the right orchestrator skill for this DevOps task and execute it
Pull the full agent inventory from the orchestrator and write it to a local ops file
Fetch the incident post-mortem page, reason through what went wrong, and write a runbook
Evaluate provision candidates for my session, bind the best one, and document the decision in Notion
Run the full ChittyID provisioning flow — candidates, evaluate, bind — and write the decision record to a file
List all ChittyAgent agents, search evidence for relevant governance policies, reason about gaps, and write a landscape report
List all ChittyOS ecosystem skills, reason about which ones cover deployment and infrastructure tasks, and write a prioritized skill selection guide to a file
Fork a specialist legal analysis context from my generalist agent and bind this session to it
List all skills, filter to devops capabilities, reason about how they chain together for a zero-downtime deployment, and write the capability analysis
